name: woom
description: Woom — a focused, warm-lit workspace for software work.

scripts.sidecars:debug: cargo build --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p woom-jira -p woom-github -p woom-memory -p woom-sentry -p woom-app && bash scripts/copy-sidecars.sh debug
scripts.sidecars:release: cargo build --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p woom-jira -p woom-github -p woom-memory -p woom-sentry -p woom-app --release && bash scripts/copy-sidecars.sh release
scripts.build:universal: pnpm sidecars:release && pnpm --filter @woom/desktop tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
